params.SpellDescription: Until end of turn, you may cast instant and sorcery spells from the top of your graveyard. If a spell cast this way would be put into a graveyard this turn, exile it instead.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Until end of turn, you may cast instant and sorcery spells from the top of your graveyard. If a spell cast this way would be put into a graveyard this turn, exile it instead.
